title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 307.275 - State agencies to cooperate with commission
text:
307.275.  State agencies to cooperate with commission. — Within appropriations available therefor, the departments, agencies and officers of the government of this state may cooperate with and assist the vehicle equipment safety commission within the scope contemplated by article III(h) of the compact.  The departments, agencies and officers of the government of this state are authorized generally to cooperate with said commission.
(L. 1965 p. 495 § 6)
